mapper.sql: id, user_id, sign_date, consecutive_days, points_granted, created_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO sign_in_record (user_id, sign_date, consecutive_days, points_granted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{signDate}, #{consecutiveDays}, #{pointsGranted})
mapper.select: SELECT sign_date FROM sign_in_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sign_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT consecutive_days FROM sign_in_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY sign_date DESC LIMIT 1
